stemHtml:
Before departing from Gander International Airport (CYQX) in Canada on the 15th, a flight crew receives the following meteorological information:

CYQX AD WRNG 2 VALID 151430/151800 HVY SN 20CM OBS INTSF

Which of the following correctly describes the meaning of the message?

options.a: Heavy snow is forecast from 14:30 UTC intensifying. A snowfall of less than 20 cm is forecast.
options.b: Heavy snow has been observed and is expected to intensify, with an expected snowfall of 20 cm.
options.c: Heavy snow has been observed, currently 20cm deep. It is expected to stop by 14:30 UTC.
options.d: Heavy snow, 20cm deep, has been observed and is providing poor braking action on all runways.
